parsed_review.summary: CP00-414 is a clean descriptor-only slice over RP13.P08.M05.S14-RP13.P08.M06.S01 (risk A, 10 units, impl:7/hermes_evidence:2/test:1; micro rows M05:9, M06:1). Plan binding is consistent across all sources: manifest, review-baseline, closeout-pack-plan.json packs entry (line 411), contract current_pack (contract line 16-31), the p08_permission_fixture_slice_descriptor projection (contract line 24262), PAYMENTS_CORE_CP414_PACK_BINDING (registry.js:375), and PAYMENTS_CORE_CP414_REQUIREMENTS (registry.js:2046). The descriptor builders (service.js:2790-2909) return only Object.frozen descriptor data with every runtime/write/persist/dispatch flag false and every row descriptor_only:true / runtime_execution:false; the contract cp414_no_write_attestation (line 4431) and inherited base flags (registry.js:424-425) confirm promotes_claude_to_final_approval:false and claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation:false. Validators (validators.js:3981-4148) enforce coverage, distribution, descriptor-only rows, and authority boundaries; three CP414 tests (model.test.js:1511-1560) and the contract validator's deep-equality assertions (validate-rp13-payments-core-contract.mjs:1236-1262) exercise them. command-evidence.json records all implementation, contract, plan, and repo-wide gates at exit 0, and the readiness auth preflight passed with a non-zero valid-JSON stdout (no auth failure, 0-byte, or malformed output). Public exports are surfaced via index.js wildcard re-export and README documents the CP00-414 section. The pack correctly keeps production_ready:false / runtime_ready:false / implemented_pending_review; the production_ready_flag denotes descriptor verification only and weakens no gate. Hermes patterns are confined to deterministic descriptor evidence packet/receipt metadata (H13, emits_hermes_runtime_receipt:false), not product runtime. Claude remains a read-only reviewer (Read/Grep/Glob, read_only:true) and not the final approver; human final approval remains required for any enterprise trust claim. No P0/P1/P2/P3 defects identified. The absence of claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json is the expected pre-review state per the hardening sequence and is not a finding. This verdict is an independent review recommendation, not final approval authority.
